ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_aid_types" (
  "aid_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of financial aid */,
  "aid_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial aid type (e.g., Grant, Scholarship) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial aid type */,
  "is_scholarship" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the aid is a scholarship */,
  "is_federal" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the aid is federal assistance */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Detailed criteria for eligibility */,
  "annual_budget" TEXT /* Annual budget allocated for this type of aid */,
  "max_amount" TEXT /* Maximum amount that can be awarded to a single student */,
  "min_amount" TEXT /* Minimum amount that can be awarded to a single student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aid_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aid distribution record */,
  "aid_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of financial aid */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year for the distribution */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester for the distribution */,
  "number_receiving_aid" INTEGER /* Number of students receiving this type of aid */,
  "percent_receiving_aid" REAL /* Percentage of students receiving this type of aid */,
  "total_amount_aid" TEXT /* Total amount of aid distributed */,
  "average_amount_aid" TEXT /* Average amount of aid received per student */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the cohort */,
  "total_eligible_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students eligible for this type of aid */,
  "average_gpa" REAL /* Average GPA of students receiving this type of aid */,
  "average_financial_need" TEXT /* Average financial need of students receiving this type of aid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_distribution_aid_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("aid_type_id") REFERENCES financial_aid_types ("aid_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "aid_received" TEXT /* Total financial aid received by the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" INTEGER /* Year of study (e.g., 1 for first year) */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the student */,
  "financial_need" TEXT /* Financial need of the student */,
  "is_international" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the student is international */,
  "is_first_generation" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the student is a first-generation college student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial aid application */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student applying for aid */,
  "aid_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of financial aid applied for */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., Approved, Pending) */,
  "academic_year" TEXT /* Academic year for the application */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester for the application */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "year_of_study" INTEGER /* Year of study (e.g., 1 for first year) */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the student */,
  "financial_need" TEXT /* Financial need of the student */,
  "is_international" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the student is international */,
  "is_first_generation" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the student is a first-generation college student */,
  "application_reason" TEXT /* Reason for applying for financial aid */,
  "additional_documents" TEXT /* Additional documents submitted with the application */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the application */,
  "reviewed_date" TEXT /* Date the application was reviewed */,
  "final_decision" TEXT /* Final decision on the application (e.g., Approved, Denied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_applications_aid_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("aid_type_id") REFERENCES financial_aid_types ("aid_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_applications_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., Update, Delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the action was performed */,
  "row_id" INTEGER /* ID of the row where the action was performed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the action */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
